productName: Pot of Gold - Hash Hole 1g Dole Whip (P.O.G) (S) & Jet Blue (Ice Queen) (S)
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Dole Whip and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of pineapple, tropical, and diesel, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
